sections.content: In today’s Volatile, Uncertain, Complex and Ambiguous (VUCA) world things are changing at faster pace where disruption is the ‘new normal’. Organisations are advancing in highly dynamic & complex world, where the need to be agile with a long term vision, is the need of the hour. To excel in this VUCA world, the employees must accelerate & develop the cognitive readiness for sustainability and growth. ‘Outsmarting VUCA’ is a two day interactive program, that helps to understand the VUCA world and approaches to be adopted to manage today’s rapidly changing scenarios. It is an immersive learning workshop with case studies, role plays, forecasting and assessments. It equips with right techniques and mindset to manoeuvre through the VUCA landscape with ease.

content: Understand VUCA & its challenges in business
Skills & techniques for managing business in a VUCA world
Overcome volatility in business by having a long term vision and downloading it to the team
Explore various uncertainties for the business and make plans to address them
Understand levels of complexity in organisation & turn this to clarity for your employees
Learn about Ambiguity in business and have an agile corporate environment
